common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.slide1_body: We tell you where to go in 2 minutes.

auth.otp_title: Enter the code we sent you
auth.locked_out: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
auth.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
auth.notification_permission_body: We send one follow-up 24 hours after your visit to check everything went well.

consent.title: Before we continue
consent.body: Travel Health Bridge helps you find verified doctors. We are a referral platform, not a medical provider. Always call 102 or 108 for life-threatening emergencies. By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

triage_result.header: Based on what you shared, go here:
triage_result.language_gap_note: If language is a barrier at the clinic, message us immediately.
triage_result.alone_sheet_title: I'm alone and may need help getting there
triage_result.alone_operating_hours: We're available 8am-11pm IST to guide you through this.

offline_result.header: You're offline. Showing cached options for {city}.
offline_result.helpline_note: Message us when connected for live recommendations.
offline_result.cache_timestamp: Last verified: {date}. Call ahead before visiting.

emergency.whatsapp_prefill: EMERGENCY — I need urgent help in {city}
emergency.outside_hours: Outside operating hours (8am-11pm IST). For life-threatening emergencies: call 102 immediately. Leave us a message and we will respond at 8am.
emergency.add_contact: Add an emergency contact in your Medical Vault
emergency.sos_prefill: EMERGENCY SOS — I am at: {location}. I need urgent medical assistance.

consent_message_modal.no_contact: No emergency contact saved. Add one in your Vault.
consent_message_modal.message_preview: Hi {contactName}, this is an automated message from Travel Health Bridge. {userName} may need medical assistance in {city}. Their recommended clinic is {providerName} at {address}. Please try to reach them.
consent_message_modal.consent_note: This opens WhatsApp for you to send. We do not send automatically without your confirmation.

search.empty_state: No providers found. Message our helpline for help.

provider_profile.price_tooltip: This provider agreed in writing to charge within this range. Charged more? Report it — we investigate within 24 hours.
provider_profile.reviews_placeholder: Reviews from verified travelers will appear here as they visit.
provider_profile.language_note: Language verified by Travel Health Bridge. Tests communication ability.
provider_profile.stale_label: Availability recently unconfirmed — call ahead before visiting

overcharge_report.title: Report Overcharge
overcharge_report.confirmation: We investigate within 24 hours and take corrective action against providers who charge beyond their committed range. We will update you on the outcome.

vault.title: Medical Vault
vault.privacy_note: Your health information is stored securely. Only you can access it. We never share it without your consent.
vault.insurance_helpline_sub: For hospital cashless processing or reimbursement.
vault.guest_prompt: Sign in to save your medical information and access it anywhere.

feedback.step0_question: Before opening Travel Health Bridge, had anyone or anything already suggested a doctor to you?
feedback.source_travelmedix: No — Travel Health Bridge was my first step
feedback.step1_question: Did you get medical help after this?
feedback.step2_question: Was the cost within the quoted range?
feedback.step4_question: Was communication in your language comfortable?
feedback.step5_question: Would you use Travel Health Bridge again in another city?
feedback.step6_placeholder: What went well or could be better...
feedback.thank_you_body: Your feedback helps us improve for every traveler.

profile.delete_section_title: What Happens When You Delete Your Account
profile.deleted_list: Your medical vault data (blood group, allergies, medications, emergency contacts, insurance details). Your push notification token. Your name and phone number from our records.
profile.anonymised_header: Anonymised and retained (no longer linked to you):
profile.anonymised_list: Records of triage sessions are kept for 24 months to improve our provider recommendations — but your name and phone are removed within 30 days. Feedback records are retained for 36 months to hold providers accountable — but are fully anonymised. If you reported an overcharge, that report is kept for 48 months for legal purposes — without your identity.
profile.retention_why_body: Provider accountability depends on feedback history. A clinic with a pattern of overcharging travelers should not appear trustworthy simply because individual complainants deleted their accounts. Anonymised records protect future travelers.

helpline.accessibility_label: Message Travel Health Bridge helpline. Number: {number}
